title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 2: The Yoga of Knowledge
description: Chapter 2 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna teaches Arjuna the immortality of the soul and the discipline of selfless action.
introduction: Chapter 2 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna teaches Arjuna the immortality of the soul and the discipline of selfless action.

translation.text: The soul is never born and never dies. It is not slain when the body is slain.
